# UH APEX local routing for Houston and ZIP 77084

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Organization: UH APEX Accelerator Local area: Houston area, example ZIP 77084 Office or partner: UH APEX Accelerator, University of Houston Bauer College of Business

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns certification, funding, government contracting during Validation, Launch, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Organization: UH APEX Accelerator
- Local area: Houston area, example ZIP 77084
- Office or partner: UH APEX Accelerator, University of Houston Bauer College of Business
- ## BOSS routing summary
- Use when a Houston-area user is legally formed, for-profit, and wants help selling to federal, state, or local government.
- ## Local service area
- UH APEX serves a 28-county area including Harris, Fort Bend, Waller, Brazoria, Galveston, Chambers, Liberty, Jefferson, Orange, Hardin, and other counties.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/default.asp>

## Next handoff

Verify exact address/county and legal/for-profit status. If eligible, route to UH APEX services and counseling; if not formed, route to SBDC/SCORE first.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
